description: Models NOT qualified because a newer same-family model supersedes them. Skipped from canonical testing per user directive 2026-04-20: 'apenas os tipos modernos'.

qwen2.5:latest.reason: superseded by qwen3:8b (same 7B tier, newer generation)

qwen2.5-coder:7b.reason: superseded by qwen3:8b; qwen2.5 generation deprecated
qwen2.5-coder:7b.notes: Was a coder specialist; no direct qwen3 coder replacement exists yet. Consider testing if coder specialization matters later.

llama3.1:8b.reason: superseded by llama3.2 (base) and llama3.2-vision (11B); llama3.1 generation deprecated

gemma2:9b.historical_note: F53 (archive_v01): 0% TCF compatibility — consistent with obsolete status

phi3:latest.reason: superseded by phi4 (14B base) and phi4-mini (3.8B); phi3 deprecated

mistral:latest.reason: mistral 7B baseline; mistral-small3.2 (24B) is modern but not installed (needs Q3 to fit 12GB)

rationale: Testing obsolete variants wastes runtime AND produces findings that won't generalize — since users moving to modern replacements won't encounter the obsolete behavior. Keep them installed for ad-hoc ablations only.
